description:
Advances: specled.binding, specled.branch_guard, specled.realized_by, specled.append_only, specled.severity

Fix 5 mix spec.check findings on the epic branch feature/file-touch-yields-to-realization (at /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-file-touch-yields-to-realization). These must be resolved before the epic PR to main.

1. overlap/duplicate_covers (4 findings) — each requirement may only appear in one scenario covers: field. Remove the redundant entry from secondary scenarios (keep in the most representative one):
   - specled.binding.resolve_with_source_returns_path: in resolve_with_source_beam_path AND resolve_with_source_path_unknown — remove from resolve_with_source_path_unknown, keep in resolve_with_source_beam_path
   - specled.branch_guard.file_touch_yields_to_attested_file: in file_touch_attested_clean_downgrades, file_touch_drift_no_relaxation, file_touch_surface_only_unbound_stays_strict — remove from drift_no_relaxation and surface_only_unbound, keep in attested_clean_downgrades
   - specled.realized_by.attestation_tagged_tests_expansion: in attestation_tagged_tests_drifted_requirement_no_expand AND attestation_tagged_tests_expand — remove from drifted_requirement_no_expand, keep in attestation_tagged_tests_expand
   - specled.realized_by.orchestrator_publishes_attestations: in attestation_clean_binding_appears AND attestation_drifted_binding_absent — remove from attestation_drifted_binding_absent, keep in attestation_clean_binding_appears

2. branch_guard_missing_subject_update (1 finding) — test/specled_ex/branch_check_test.exs was changed and impacts specled.append_only and specled.severity, but those specs were not co-updated. Fix by adding requirement-level realized_by bindings to the relevant requirements in .spec/specs/append_only.spec.md and .spec/specs/severity.spec.md that map to the test file.

Allowed touches:
- .spec/specs/binding.spec.md (covers: field edits in scenarios only)
- .spec/specs/branch_guard.spec.md (covers: field edits in scenarios only)
- .spec/specs/realized_by.spec.md (covers: field edits in scenarios only)
- .spec/specs/append_only.spec.md (realized_by additions at requirement level)
- .spec/specs/severity.spec.md (realized_by additions at requirement level)

No code changes. No test changes.

Verification:
- GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null mix spec.check exits 0 on the epic branch
- GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null mix test passes (802 tests)
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean

Work from a worktree based on feature/file-touch-yields-to-realization. The epic worktree is at /Users/mz/src/specled_ex-file-touch-yields-to-realization.

Verification stubs flipped: none (existing tagged_tests stubs already executing)

Summary:
Cleared the 5 mix spec.check findings on the epic branch. The four
overlap/duplicate_covers errors were fixed by removing the redundant
requirement id from the secondary scenarios listed in the ticket
(each requirement now appears in exactly one scenario's `covers:` field,
with the dropped scenarios using `covers: []`). The single
branch_guard_missing_subject_update error was fixed by adding
requirement-level `realized_by` bindings to the three requirements whose
@tag spec annotations live in test/specled_ex/branch_check_test.exs:
- specled.append_only.requirement_deleted → SpecLedEx.AppendOnly.analyze/4 (api_boundary)
- specled.append_only.no_baseline        → SpecLedEx.AppendOnly.analyze/4 (api_boundary)
- specled.severity.resolve_precedence    → SpecLedEx.BranchCheck.Severity.resolve/3 (implementation)

Both subjects already have tagged_tests verifications covering these
requirements, so the orchestrator's tagged_tests expansion now flows
the clean production-code attestation through to the test file path,
attesting the (subject, test/specled_ex/branch_check_test.exs) pairs
that were previously unattested.

Verification:
- GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null mix spec.check → findings=0 (was 5)
- GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL=/dev/null mix test → 802 tests, 2 properties, 0 failures
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors → clean

Note: mix format --check-formatted reports a pre-existing format violation
in lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex that lives on origin/main (not introduced
by this ticket); the ticket explicitly forbids code/test changes so this
is out of scope.

title: Fix mix spec.check findings on epic branch
